<html lang="ur" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Home Tuition Center - Mingora, Swat</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Amiri:wght@400;700&family=Noto+Nastaliq+Urdu:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --teal: #1abc9c;
  --teal-dark: #0e9b7e;
  --teal-light: #1de9b6;
  --dark: #1a1a2e;
  --dark2: #16213e;
  --dark3: #0f3460;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --gold: #f4d03f;
  --text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  --card-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  font-family: 'Noto Nastaliq Urdu', 'Amiri', serif;
  background: var(--dark);
  color: var(--white);
  direction: rtl;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 200;
  background: rgba(26,26,46,0.95);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 28px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.2);
}
.nav-logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.nav-logo img {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 2px solid var(--teal);
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.nav-logo img:hover { transform: scale(1.08); }
.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 24px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-links a {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  transition: color 0.2s;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  padding: 2px 0;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--teal); border-bottom-color: var(--teal); }

/* ── FACEBOOK-STYLE COVER ── */
.fb-cover-wrap {
  margin-top: 68px;
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 380px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #000;
}
.fb-cover-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  display: block;
}
.fb-cover-gradient {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 50%, rgba(26,26,46,0.85) 100%);
}

/* Profile section below cover */
.fb-profile-row {
  background: var(--dark2);
  padding: 0 5% 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 24px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.15);
  position: relative;
}
.fb-profile-pic {
  margin-top: -60px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.fb-profile-pic img {
  width: 160px;
  height: 160px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 4px solid var(--dark2);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,188,156,0.35);
  display: block;
}
.fb-profile-info {
  padding-bottom: 8px;
  flex: 1;
}
.fb-profile-info h1 {
  font-family: 'Amiri', serif;
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.fb-profile-info p {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.fb-profile-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── HERO SECTION ── */
.hero {
  background: var(--dark2);
  padding: 60px 6% 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 40px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 75vh;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -80px; left: -80px;
  width: 500px; height: 500px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,188,156,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
  border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.hero-text {
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 560px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: fadeRight 0.9s ease both;
}
.hero-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--dark);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 6px 20px;
  border-radius: 50px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero-text h1 {
  font-family: 'Amiri', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.hero-text h1 span { color: var(--teal); }
.hero-text p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 2;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn-teal {
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--dark);
  padding: 13px 30px;
  border-radius: 50px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.btn-teal:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(26,188,156,0.45); }
.btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 13px 30px;
  border-radius: 50px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--teal); color: var(--teal); }

.hero-image-wrap {
  flex: 0 0 330px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: fadeLeft 0.9s ease 0.2s both;
}
.hero-ring {
  width: 310px; height: 310px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal) 0%, var(--dark3) 100%);
  position: relative;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(26,188,156,0.35);
}
.hero-ring::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--dark2);
}
.hero-ring img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  width: calc(100% - 12px);
  height: calc(100% - 12px);
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.hero-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 36px;
  margin-top: 46px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  animation: fadeRight 0.9s ease 0.5s both;
}
.stat { text-align: center; }
.stat-number { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--teal); font-family: 'Amiri', serif; display: block; }
.stat-label { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

.hero-wave { position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; width: 100%; line-height: 0; }

/* ── WAVE INFO ── */
.wave-section {
  background: var(--teal);
  position: relative;
  padding: 60px 6%;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.wave-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: -10%;
  width: 120%; height: 100%;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, var(--teal-light) 0%, var(--teal) 60%);
  transform: skewY(-2deg);
}
.wave-section-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  display: flex;
  gap: 30px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.wave-info-card {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 22px 28px;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--dark);
  min-width: 170px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
}
.wave-info-card h3 { font-family: 'Amiri', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--dark); }
.wave-info-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; }
.wave-info-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }

/* ── SUBJECTS ── */
.subjects-section { background: var(--dark2); padding: 80px 6%; }
.section-head { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 50px; }
.section-head h2 { font-family: 'Amiri', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem); color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.section-head h2 span { color: var(--teal); }
.section-head p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 1rem; }
.teal-line { width: 60px; height: 4px; background: var(--teal); margin: 14px auto 0; border-radius: 2px; }

.subjects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(190px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  max-width: 950px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.subject-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.18);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: transform 0.25s, border-color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
}
.subject-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: var(--teal); box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(26,188,156,0.2); }
.subject-icon { font-size: 2.6rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.subject-card h3 { color: var(--teal); font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.subject-card p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.8; }

/* ── TEACHER ── */
.teacher-section { background: var(--dark); padding: 80px 6%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.teacher-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: -100px; top: -100px;
  width: 400px; height: 400px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,188,156,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.teacher-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr;
  gap: 60px;
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.teacher-photo-wrap { position: relative; }
.teacher-photo {
  width: 280px; height: 280px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(26,188,156,0.3);
  border: 3px solid var(--teal);
  display: block;
}
.teacher-badge-float {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -14px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--dark);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 6px 18px;
  border-radius: 50px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.teacher-info h2 { font-family: 'Amiri', serif; font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3.5vw, 2.4rem); color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.teacher-info h2 span { color: var(--teal); }
.teacher-info .title-tag { color: var(--teal); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px; display: block; }
.teacher-info p { color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 2.1; font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.teacher-quals { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px; }
.qual-chip {
  background: rgba(26,188,156,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.3);
  color: var(--teal);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 50px;
}

/* ── CLASSES ── */
.classes-wave { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-dark), var(--teal)); padding: 80px 6%; }
.classes-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.class-card {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 36px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  transition: transform 0.25s, background 0.25s;
}
.class-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.28); }
.class-level { font-size: 2.4rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.class-card h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.class-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

/* ── ACHIEVEMENTS ── */
.achievements-section { background: var(--dark2); padding: 80px 6%; }
#achievements-container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 22px;
  max-width: 950px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.achievement-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.15);
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.25s;
}
.achievement-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.achievement-img {
  width: 100%; height: 160px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark3), var(--dark));
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
}
.achievement-body { padding: 20px; }
.achievement-body h3 { color: var(--teal); font-size: 1.05rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.achievement-body p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.8; }
.achievement-date {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 10px;
  background: rgba(26,188,156,0.12);
  color: var(--teal);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  padding: 3px 12px;
  border-radius: 50px;
}

/* ── GALLERY ── */
.gallery-section { background: var(--dark); padding: 80px 6%; }
#gallery-container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.gallery-item {
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.1);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
}
.gallery-item:hover { transform: scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(26,188,156,0.2); }
.gallery-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
.gallery-placeholder {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  height: 100%; gap: 8px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 2rem;
}
.gallery-placeholder span { font-size: 0.85rem; }

/* ── ADMIN ── */
.admin-section { background: var(--dark2); padding: 80px 6%; }
.admin-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 28px; max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }
.upload-box {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.2);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 32px;
}
.upload-box h3 { color: var(--teal); font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.form-group label { display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.form-group input, .form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.2);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  direction: rtl;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--teal); }
.form-group textarea { height: 80px; resize: vertical; }
.btn-upload {
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--dark);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 50px;
  padding: 12px 28px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.btn-upload:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(26,188,156,0.4); }
.msg-success { display: none; color: var(--teal); font-size: 0.88rem; margin-top: 10px; text-align: center; }

/* ── CONTACT ── */
.contact-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark3), var(--dark)); padding: 80px 6%; }
.contact-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.contact-card {
  background: rgba(26,188,156,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.2);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: transform 0.25s;
}
.contact-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.contact-icon { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.contact-card h3 { color: var(--teal); margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 1rem; }
.contact-card p, .contact-card a { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.8; }
.contact-card a:hover { color: var(--teal); }

/* ── GOOGLE MAP ── */
.map-section { background: var(--dark2); padding: 80px 6%; }
.map-container {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  border-radius: 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 2px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.25);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}
.map-container iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 420px;
  display: block;
  border: none;
}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer {
  background: var(--dark);
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(26,188,156,0.15);
  padding: 36px 6%;
  text-align: center;
}
footer p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.88rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
footer span { color: var(--teal); }

/* ── LIGHTBOX ── */
.lightbox {
  display: none;
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
  z-index: 500;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.lightbox.active { display: flex; }
.lightbox img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 90vh; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(26,188,156,0.3); }
.lightbox-close {
  position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px;
  background: var(--teal); color: var(--dark);
  border: none; width: 40px; height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700;
}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeRight {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}
@keyframes fadeLeft {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-40px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .fb-cover-wrap { height: 200px; }
  .fb-profile-pic img { width: 110px; height: 110px; }
  .fb-profile-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  .hero { flex-direction: column; padding: 60px 5% 60px; text-align: center; gap: 40px; }
  .hero-btns { justify-content: center; }
  .hero-stats { justify-content: center; }
  .hero-image-wrap { flex: 0 0 auto; }
  .hero-ring { width: 250px; height: 250px; }
  .teacher-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; }
  .teacher-photo { margin: 0 auto; }
  .teacher-quals { justify-content: center; }
  .admin-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#" onclick="location.reload(); return false;">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Home Tuition Center Logo" />
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#hero">صفحہ اول</a></li>
    <li><a href="#subjects">مضامین</a></li>
    <li><a href="#teacher">استاد</a></li>
    <li><a href="#classes">جماعتیں</a></li>
    <li><a href="#achievements">کامیابیاں</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">رابطہ</a></li>
    <li><a href="#map">نقشہ</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- FACEBOOK-STYLE COVER -->
<div class="fb-cover-wrap">
  <img class="fb-cover-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Home Tuition Centre Banner" />
  <div class="fb-cover-gradient"></div>
</div>

<!-- PROFILE ROW -->
<div class="fb-profile-row">
  <div class="fb-profile-pic">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Home Tuition Center" />
  </div>
  <div class="fb-profile-info">
    <h1>Home Tuition Center</h1>
    <p>منگورہ، سوات | تعلیمی مرکز</p>
  </div>
  <div class="fb-profile-btns">
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-teal" style="font-size:0.85rem;padding:10px 22px;">داخلہ لیں</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <div class="hero-badge">✦ منگورہ، سوات</div>
    <h1><span>علم</span> روشنی ہے<br>ہر بچے کا حق</h1>
    <p>ہوم ٹیوشن سینٹر میں ماہر اساتذہ کی نگرانی میں پرائمری سے FSc تک اعلیٰ معیاری تعلیم حاصل کریں۔</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-teal">داخلہ لیں</a>
      <a href="#subjects" class="btn-ghost">مضامین دیکھیں</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat">
        <span class="stat-number">۱۰+</span>
        <span class="stat-label">سالوں کا تجربہ</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <span class="stat-number">۸۰+</span>
        <span class="stat-label">کامیاب طلبہ</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <span class="stat-number">۸</span>
        <span class="stat-label">مضامین</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-image-wrap">
    <div class="hero-ring">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="استاد عادل خان" />
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-wave">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveAspectRatio="none">
      <path d="M0,40 C360,80 1080,0 1440,40 L1440,80 L0,80 Z" fill="#1abc9c"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TEAL WAVE: HOURS & INFO -->
<section class="wave-section" id="hours">
  <div class="wave-section-inner">
    <div class="wave-info-card">
      <div class="wave-info-icon">🕐</div>
      <h3>ہفتہ وار اوقات</h3>
      <p>پیر تا جمعہ<br>شام ۴ بجے — رات ۹ بجے</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wave-info-card">
      <div class="wave-info-icon">📅</div>
      <h3>ہفتہ / اتوار</h3>
      <p>شام ۴ بجے — رات ۹ بجے</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wave-info-card">
      <div class="wave-info-icon">📍</div>
      <h3>ہماری شاخ</h3>
      <p>منگورہ، سوات<br>خیبر پختونخوا</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wave-info-card">
      <div class="wave-info-icon">📞</div>
      <h3>رابطہ نمبر</h3>
      <p><a href="tel:+923499236145" style="color:var(--dark);font-weight:700;">0349-9236145</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SUBJECTS -->
<section class="subjects-section" id="subjects">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>ہمارے <span>مضامین</span></h2>
    <p>تمام اہم مضامین ماہر اساتذہ کی نگرانی میں</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="subjects-grid">
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">⚛️</div><h3>فزکس</h3><p>میٹرک اور FSc کی مکمل تیاری</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">📐</div><h3>ریاضی</h3><p>الجبرا، جیومیٹری، کیلکولس</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">🧪</div><h3>کیمسٹری</h3><p>نظریہ اور عملی تجربات</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">🔬</div><h3>بیالوجی</h3><p>جدید نصاب کے مطابق</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">🌍</div><h3>انگریزی</h3><p>گرامر اور تحریر</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">📖</div><h3>اردو</h3><p>ادب اور قواعد</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">🗺️</div><h3>سماجی علوم</h3><p>تاریخ، جغرافیہ، شہریت</p></div>
    <div class="subject-card"><div class="subject-icon">💻</div><h3>کمپیوٹر</h3><p>بنیادی تعلیم اور مہارت</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TEACHER -->
<section class="teacher-section" id="teacher">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>آپ کے <span>استاد</span></h2>
    <p>ہمارے ماہر اور تجربہ کار سائنس ٹیچر</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="teacher-grid">
    <div class="teacher-photo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="استاد عادل خان" class="teacher-photo" />
      <div class="teacher-badge-float">سائنس ٹیچر</div>
    </div>
    <div class="teacher-info">
      <h2>عادل <span>خان</span></h2>
      <span class="title-tag">BSc فزکس | یونیورسٹی آف سوات</span>
      <p>
        عادل خان ایک تجربہ کار سائنس اور ریاضی کے استاد ہیں جو منگورہ، سوات میں تعلیمی خدمات انجام دے رہے ہیں۔ انہوں نے یونیورسٹی آف سوات سے بی ایس فزکس میں A+ گریڈ حاصل کیا اور بین الاقوامی جریدے میں تحقیقی مقالہ بھی شائع کیا۔
      </p>
      <p>
        طلبہ کی انفرادی ضروریات کو مدنظر رکھتے ہوئے انہوں نے سینکڑوں بچوں کو بورڈ امتحانات میں بہترین نتائج دلائے ہیں۔
      </p>
      <div class="teacher-quals">
        <span class="qual-chip">BSc فزکس — A+ گریڈ</span>
        <span class="qual-chip">تحقیقی مقالہ شائع شدہ</span>
        <span class="qual-chip">ETEA ٹیسٹ پریپریٹر</span>
        <span class="qual-chip">۱۰+ سال تجربہ</span>
        <span class="qual-chip">میٹرک و FSc تیاری</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CLASSES -->
<section class="classes-wave" id="classes">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2 style="color:var(--dark);">ہماری <span style="color:#0d2b1a;">جماعتیں</span></h2>
    <p style="color:rgba(0,0,0,0.65);">پرائمری سے FSc تک — سب کے لیے</p>
    <div class="teal-line" style="background:#0d2b1a;"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="classes-grid">
    <div class="class-card"><div class="class-level">🌱</div><h3>پرائمری</h3><p>جماعت ۱ تا ۵</p></div>
    <div class="class-card"><div class="class-level">📗</div><h3>مڈل</h3><p>جماعت ۶ تا ۸</p></div>
    <div class="class-card"><div class="class-level">🎯</div><h3>میٹرک</h3><p>جماعت ۹ تا ۱۰</p></div>
    <div class="class-card"><div class="class-level">🚀</div><h3>FSc</h3><p>جماعت ۱۱ تا ۱۲</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ACHIEVEMENTS -->
<section class="achievements-section" id="achievements">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>بچوں کی <span>کامیابیاں</span></h2>
    <p>ہمارے ہونہار طلبہ کی شاندار کارکردگی</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="achievements-container">
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-img">🏆</div>
      <div class="achievement-body">
        <h3>پوزیشن ہولڈر طالب علم</h3>
        <p>بورڈ امتحان میں شاندار نتیجہ — اے پلس گریڈ حاصل کیا</p>
        <div class="achievement-date">2024</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-img">⭐</div>
      <div class="achievement-body">
        <h3>ریاضی اولمپیاڈ</h3>
        <p>ضلعی سطح پر پہلی پوزیشن — طالب علم احمد خان</p>
        <div class="achievement-date">2024</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-img">🎖️</div>
      <div class="achievement-body">
        <h3>سائنس فیئر انعام</h3>
        <p>اسکول سطح پر سائنس پروجیکٹ میں اول انعام</p>
        <div class="achievement-date">2023</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery-section" id="gallery">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>ہماری <span>تصویریں</span></h2>
    <p>مرکز کی سرگرمیاں اور یادیں</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="gallery-container">
    <div class="gallery-item"><div class="gallery-placeholder">📷<span>تصویر جلد آئے گی</span></div></div>
    <div class="gallery-item"><div class="gallery-placeholder">📷<span>تصویر جلد آئے گی</span></div></div>
    <div class="gallery-item"><div class="gallery-placeholder">📷<span>تصویر جلد آئے گی</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ADMIN UPLOAD -->
<section class="admin-section" id="admin">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>مواد <span>اپلوڈ کریں</span></h2>
    <p>تصویریں اور کامیابیاں شامل کریں</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="admin-grid">
    <div class="upload-box">
      <h3>🏆 کامیابی شامل کریں</h3>
      <div class="form-group"><label>طالب علم کا نام</label><input type="text" id="ach-name" placeholder="مثلاً: احمد خان"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>تفصیل</label><textarea id="ach-desc" placeholder="مثلاً: بورڈ میں اے پلس حاصل کیا"></textarea></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>سال</label><input type="text" id="ach-year" placeholder="مثلاً: 2025"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>تصویر (اختیاری)</label><input type="file" id="ach-img" accept="image/*"></div>
      <button class="btn-upload" onclick="addAchievement()">کامیابی شامل کریں ✓</button>
      <div class="msg-success" id="ach-msg">✓ کامیابی شامل ہو گئی!</div>
    </div>
    <div class="upload-box">
      <h3>📷 گیلری تصویر اپلوڈ کریں</h3>
      <div class="form-group"><label>تصویر منتخب کریں</label><input type="file" id="gal-img" accept="image/*" multiple></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>عنوان (اختیاری)</label><input type="text" id="gal-title" placeholder="مثلاً: سالانہ تقریب 2025"></div>
      <button class="btn-upload" onclick="addGalleryPhoto()">گیلری میں شامل کریں ✓</button>
      <div class="msg-success" id="gal-msg">✓ تصویر شامل ہو گئی!</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact-section" id="contact">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>ہم سے <span>رابطہ کریں</span></h2>
    <p>داخلے کے لیے آج ہی رابطہ کریں</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-cards">
    <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon">📍</div><h3>پتہ</h3><p>قمبر، منگورہ، سوات<br>19210، پاکستان</p></div>
    <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon">📞</div><h3>فون</h3><p><a href="tel:+923499236145">0349-9236145</a></p></div>
    <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon">🕐</div><h3>اوقات</h3><p>شام ۴ بجے تا رات ۹ بجے<br>پیر تا اتوار</p></div>
    <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon">📧</div><h3>ای میل</h3><p><a href="mailto:ar2108912@gmail.com">ar2108912@gmail.com</a></p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GOOGLE MAP -->
<section class="map-section" id="map">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>ہماری <span>لوکیشن</span></h2>
    <p>Swat Mingora, Qambar, 19210, Pakistan</p>
    <div class="teal-line"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="map-container">
    <iframe
      src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3317.5!2d72.3607!3d34.7717!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x38de4f25ccc94e45%3A0x7a45a1a3e4e5b2a0!2sQambar%2C%20Mingora%2C%20Swat%2C%20Khyber%20Pakhtunkhwa%2C%20Pakistan!5e0!3m2!1sen!2s!4v1700000000000!5m2!1sen!2s"
      allowfullscreen=""
      loading="lazy"
      referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
      title="Home Tuition Center Location">
    </iframe>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:20px;">
    <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Qambar,Mingora,Swat,Pakistan" target="_blank" class="btn-teal" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:none;">
      📍 Google Maps پر کھولیں
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p>© 2025 <span>Home Tuition Center</span> — قمبر، منگورہ، سوات</p>
  <p>علم روشنی ہے — ہر بچے کا حق</p>
</footer>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
  <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
  <img id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="">
</div>

<script>
function addAchievement() {
  const name = document.getElementById('ach-name').value.trim();
  const desc = document.getElementById('ach-desc').value.trim();
  const year = document.getElementById('ach-year').value.trim();
  const imgFile = document.getElementById('ach-img').files[0];
  if (!name || !desc) { alert('براہ کرم نام اور تفصیل لکھیں۔'); return; }
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className = 'achievement-card';
  const buildCard = (imgHTML) => {
    card.innerHTML = `<div class="achievement-img" style="display:block;padding:0;">${imgHTML}</div><div class="achievement-body"><h3>${name}</h3><p>${desc}</p><div class="achievement-date">${year || '2025'}</div></div>`;
    document.getElementById('achievements-container').prepend(card);
    ['ach-name','ach-desc','ach-year'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
    document.getElementById('ach-img').value = '';
    const msg = document.getElementById('ach-msg');
    msg.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(() => msg.style.display = 'none', 3000);
  };
  if (imgFile) {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = e => buildCard(`<img src="${e.target.result}" style="width:100%;height:160px;object-fit:cover;">`);
    reader.readAsDataURL(imgFile);
  } else { buildCard('🏆'); }
}

function addGalleryPhoto() {
  const files = document.getElementById('gal-img').files;
  const title = document.getElementById('gal-title').value.trim();
  if (!files.length) { alert('براہ کرم تصویر منتخب کریں۔'); return; }
  const container = document.getElementById('gallery-container');
  container.querySelectorAll('.gallery-placeholder').forEach(p => p.parentElement.remove());
  Array.from(files).forEach(file => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = e => {
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'gallery-item';
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.src = e.target.result;
      img.alt = title || 'تصویر';
      img.onclick = () => openLightbox(e.target.result);
      item.appendChild(img);
      container.prepend(item);
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
  document.getElementById('gal-img').value = '';
  document.getElementById('gal-title').value = '';
  const msg = document.getElementById('gal-msg');
  msg.style.display = 'block';
  setTimeout(() => msg.style.display = 'none', 3000);
}

function openLightbox(src) {
  document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('active');
}
function closeLightbox() {
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('active');
}
document.getElementById('lightbox').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if (e.target === this) closeLightbox();
});
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'))?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
